item.title: Adults Keep Embarrassing Themselves at Sporting Events
item.description: From snagging a foul ball to swiping a hat, some adults just can’t resist taking the fun away from kids in the stands.

media:content.media:title: Adults Keep Embarrassing Themselves at Sporting Events
media:content.media:description: From snagging a foul ball to swiping a hat, some adults just can’t resist taking the fun away from kids in the stands.

item.title: This Movie Is Like An Unfortunate Fanfic
item.description: A playful take on a movie that feels a bit too much like fan fiction.

media:content.media:title: This Movie Is Like An Unfortunate Fanfic
media:content.media:description: A playful take on a movie that feels a bit too much like fan fiction.

item.title: The 90s Called, They Want Their Bad Movie Back
item.description: A playful throwback to a movie that feels straight out of the 90s.

media:content.media:title: The 90s Called, They Want Their Bad Movie Back
media:content.media:description: A playful throwback to a movie that feels straight out of the 90s.
